queries.q: I'm walking into an exec review on our missed targets tomorrow; prep me on stakes, positions, and messaging
Help me prepare for a negotiation with our biggest customer about the renewal terms

I need something from legal in this meeting and cannot afford it to get buried; prep my talking points and anticipated pushback
Build my private prep doc for the board meeting: risks, asks, and key messages
This stakeholder has been resistant; give me positioning and anticipated objections before we meet
Prepare me for tomorrow's tense roadmap conversation with the data team lead
What should my strategy be walking into this budget-approval conversation with finance?
Draft my talking points and success signals ahead of the partnership discussion on Thursday
I need to calibrate with a new stakeholder I've never met; prep me on likely positions and how to build the relationship
Build the shared agenda that attendees will see for next week's kickoff, with timeboxes
queries.notes: Attendee-facing structure, not private prep, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Set the topics and owners for tomorrow's cross-team working session
That negotiation already happened this morning; write up what was agreed and who owes what
queries.notes: Post-meeting summarization, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Summarize the outcomes of yesterday's exec review for the people who attended
Just give me the standard weekly-standup agenda, nothing fancy, low stakes
